title: hornera urens
intro: Hornera urens, also known as the Upright Horsetail, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Horsetail (Equisetum) and is native to Europe, Asia, and North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Hornera urens include its potential to treat urinary tract issues, reduce swelling and pain, and support immune function. Hornera urens can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
